landing.heroTitle: The Simple Way to Run a Modern Clinic
landing.heroSubtitle: SehhaTech helps healthcare providers streamline their daily operations, so you can spend less time on screens and more time with your patients.
landing.feature1Text: Book appointments effortlessly with a smart calendar that helps you manage patient flow and reduce no-shows.
landing.feature2Text: Access medical histories and clinical notes instantly on a protected cloud system designed for physician privacy.
landing.feature3Text: Track your clinic's revenue, billing, and insurance claims with simple, automated reports that save you time.
landing.role1Desc: Focus on the patient, not the screen. Digital charting made simple and fast.
landing.role2Desc: Manage patient check-ins and phone calls with an organized, intuitive interface.
landing.role3Desc: Get a bird's-eye view of your business health with easy-to-read dashboards.
landing.aboutLead: SehhaTech was built with a simple goal: to make the digital side of healthcare as intuitive as possible. We believe that technology should support the healing process, not get in its way.
landing.whyLead: We build our tools based on four key principles that keep your clinic running smoothly.
landing.principle1Text: We are honest and transparent about how we protect your data and support your decisions.
landing.principle2Text: We use smart technology to automate boring tasks and prevent human errors.
landing.principle3Text: Every screen is designed to be clear and friendly for both staff and patients.
landing.principle4Text: You can count on SehhaTech to be online and ready whenever your clinic is open.
landing.storyP1: SehhaTech started when we noticed doctors were spending more time clicking buttons than listening to patients. We saw the frustration caused by complicated systems and decided to build a better way.
landing.storyQuote: "The clinic shouldn't be a place of administrative stress. It should be a place where doctors can focus entirely on helping people heal."
landing.storyP2: Today, SehhaTech is proud to support hundreds of clinics around the world, providing a digital workspace that feels as natural and reliable as your favorite medical tools.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join 50+ clinical systems that have transformed their patient experience with SehhaTech.

contact.heroBadge: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.heroSubtitle: Questions about pricing, onboarding, or how SehhaTech fits your workflow? Our team replies fast — pick whatever feels easiest.
contact.formIntro: Fill in the form and our team will get back to you within one business day. For urgent matters, the live chat above gets you an instant answer.
contact.formPoint1: No spam, ever — just a real reply.
contact.formPoint3: Arabic & English — write however you're comfortable.
contact.fieldMessagePlaceholder: Tell us a bit about what you need help with...
contact.successText: Thanks for reaching out. Our team typically replies within 1 business day.
contact.faq1a: SehhaTech runs on a simple annual subscription of 500 EGP per clinic, covering every role — Admin, Doctors, and Receptionists — with no extra per-seat fees.
contact.faq2q: Can I migrate my existing patient records?
contact.faq2a: Yes. Our team can help you import existing clinic and patient data during onboarding. Mention your current system in the message below.
contact.faq3q: Is my clinic's data isolated from other clinics?
contact.faq3a: Completely. SehhaTech uses a Multi-Tenant architecture where every clinic's data is fully isolated and only accessible to that clinic's own authorized staff.
contact.faq4q: How long does it take to get started?
contact.faq4a: Registration takes a few minutes. After payment confirmation, your clinic workspace is activated immediately and ready for your team to log in.
contact.ctaSubtitle: Our team is one message away — or skip ahead and set up your clinic's workspace right now.

payment.trust1Desc: Your data is secured with AES-256 encryption at rest and in transit.
payment.trust2Desc: Dedicated experts to help transfer your existing records without downtime.
payment.trust3Desc: Fully compliant with the Health Insurance Portability Act (HIPAA).

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Lead: At SehhaTech, we take the privacy of clinic and patient data seriously. This Privacy Policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and how we protect it within the SehhaTech platform.
privacy.s1Body: By using SehhaTech, you agree to the data practices described in this policy.
privacy.s2Intro: We collect the following types of information when you register and use SehhaTech:
privacy.card1Body: Clinic name, address, phone number, specialization, and the admin's full name and email — collected during registration.
privacy.card2Body: Name, email, and hashed password for each user. Passwords are never stored in plain text.
privacy.card3Body: Patient records, appointment details, and any uploaded images — entered by authorized clinic staff only.
privacy.card4Body: We store only the subscription status and Paymob order ID. No card or payment details are ever stored on SehhaTech servers.
privacy.s3Intro: SehhaTech uses collected data solely to operate and improve the platform. Specifically:
privacy.s3li1: To authenticate users and enforce role-based access control.
privacy.s3li2: To isolate each clinic's data within its own secure environment.
privacy.s3li3: To manage subscription status and grant or restrict platform access.
privacy.s3li4: To store and serve clinic and patient images via Cloudinary.
privacy.s3li5: To process payments securely through Paymob.
privacy.s3Footer: We do not use your data for advertising, analytics resale, or any purpose unrelated to operating the platform.
privacy.s4Intro: SehhaTech integrates with the following trusted third-party services to operate the platform:
privacy.s5p1: Every clinic's data is completely isolated from all other clinics through SehhaTech's Multi-Tenant architecture. A dedicated middleware layer verifies each user's clinic identity on every request — no clinic can ever access another clinic's data.
privacy.s5p2: All passwords are hashed with BCrypt before storage. JWT tokens are used for session management and expire after 7 days. For more details, see our

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Last updated: 2026. Please read these terms carefully before accessing or using the SehhaTech platform.
terms.s1p1: By registering or using SehhaTech, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. These terms form a legally binding agreement between you and SehhaTech Clinical Systems regarding your use of our clinic management platform.
terms.s1p2: If you are registering on behalf of a clinic or healthcare facility, you confirm that you have the authority to bind that entity to these terms.
terms.s2p1: Each user must register with accurate information and maintain the security of their own credentials. Every team member (doctors, receptionists, admins) must have their own individual account — credential sharing is strictly prohibited.
terms.s2Quote: "New users added by a Clinic Admin are required to reset their password on first login. This ensures every account holder has a private, personal credential."
terms.s2p2: SehhaTech reserves the right to suspend any account suspected of unauthorized access or credential sharing.
terms.s3li1Body: SehhaTech operates on a fixed annual subscription of 500 EGP per clinic. Access to all platform features is granted upon successful payment confirmation.
terms.s3li2Body: All payments are processed securely through Paymob. SehhaTech does not store any card or payment details on its servers.
terms.s3li3Body: Your clinic account will be activated automatically after a successful payment. An inactive subscription means no access to the platform until renewed.
terms.s3Footer: SehhaTech reserves the right to modify subscription pricing with a minimum 30-day notice to all active account holders.
terms.s4DisclaimerText: SehhaTech is a software platform designed to support administrative and clinical workflows. It is NOT a substitute for professional medical judgment, diagnosis, or treatment.
terms.s4Intro: To the maximum extent permitted by law, SehhaTech shall not be liable for any damages resulting from:
terms.s4li1: Inaccuracies in patient data entered by clinic staff.
terms.s4li2: Service interruptions due to scheduled maintenance or infrastructure issues.
terms.s4li3: Clinical decisions made based on information managed within the platform.
terms.s4li4: Unauthorized access resulting from user credential mismanagement.
terms.s5p1: All clinic and patient data entered into SehhaTech remains the property of the respective clinic. SehhaTech does not sell, share, or use your data for any purpose beyond operating the platform.
terms.s5p2: Each clinic's data is fully isolated from other clinics through our Multi-Tenant architecture. No clinic can access another clinic's data under any circumstances.

security.title: Clinical Data Protection Standards
security.subtitle: A comprehensive overview of the technical and administrative safeguards protecting clinic and patient data at SehhaTech.
security.s1p1: SehhaTech uses a JWT Bearer authentication system with role-based access control. Every user session is issued a signed token containing their identity, role, and clinic association. Tokens expire after 7 days and must be renewed via re-authentication.
security.s1p2: The platform enforces strict role separation across four user types: SuperAdmin, ClinicAdmin, Doctor, and Receptionist. Each role is limited to only the data and actions relevant to their function. SuperAdmins operate across the entire platform, while all other roles are confined to their own clinic's data.
security.s1li1: JWT tokens signed with HS256 and validated on every request.
security.s1li3: Passwords hashed with BCrypt before storage — never stored in plain text.
security.s1li4: New users are forced to reset their password on first login (MustResetPassword = true).
security.s2p1: Every clinic operates in a fully isolated data environment. A custom TenantMiddleware runs on every authenticated request, extracting the TenantId from the JWT token and injecting it into the request context. All database queries are automatically scoped to that clinic's data.
security.s2p2: The middleware also verifies that a clinic's subscription is active before allowing access. Clinics with expired or inactive subscriptions receive a 403 Forbidden response and cannot access any system data until their subscription is renewed.
security.s3p1: All sensitive data is protected both in transit and at rest. SehhaTech enforces HTTPS for all API communication, ensuring no data is transmitted over unencrypted connections.
security.s3li1Body: TLS encryption for all data moving between client devices and the SehhaTech API server.
security.s3li2Body: BCrypt hashing with salt ensures passwords cannot be reversed even if the database is compromised.
security.s3li3Body: All clinic and patient images are stored on Cloudinary with secure HTTPS URLs. Original files are never stored on the application server.
security.s4p1: SehhaTech does not store any payment card information. All payment processing is handled entirely by Paymob, a PCI-DSS compliant payment gateway. SehhaTech only stores the resulting order ID and subscription status after a successful transaction.
security.s5p1: SehhaTech is built with healthcare data privacy requirements in mind. The platform's architecture — including tenant isolation, role-based access, forced password resets, and audit-ready data models — is designed to align with HIPAA administrative and technical safeguard requirements.
security.s5li1: Complete data isolation per clinic (Multi-Tenant architecture).
security.s5li2: Role-based access ensures minimum necessary access principle.
security.s5li3: Forced password change on first login for all new users.
security.s5li4: No payment data stored on SehhaTech servers.
security.footerText: Have questions about our security architecture? We're happy to provide more details.
